title: Grid storage for renewable peaks
description: Solar and wind surplus cannot be stored affordably at scale; curtailment wastes clean energy.

title: Industrial heat decarbonization
description: Steel and cement need high-temperature process heat; electrification and hydrogen pathways are costly.

title: Climate adaptation finance
description: Small cities lack credit for seawalls and stormwater; insurance markets are retreating from high-risk zones.

title: Methane leakage monitoring
description: Oil and gas infrastructure leaks methane; satellite coverage is incomplete and enforcement is weak.

title: Electric vehicle charging deserts
description: Apartment dwellers and rural corridors lack fast chargers; fleet electrification stalls.

title: Circular electronics
description: E-waste contains rare metals but informal recycling is toxic; formal take-back is underused.

title: Water scarcity and agriculture
description: Competing demands from cities and farms leave aquifers depleted; drip irrigation adoption is slow.

title: Deforestation supply chains
description: Soy and palm traceability is opaque; retailers struggle to verify zero-deforestation commitments.

title: Carbon accounting for SMEs
description: Small businesses cannot measure Scope 3 emissions; buyers still demand supplier disclosures.

title: Coastal blue carbon
description: Mangrove loss releases carbon and removes storm buffers; restoration funding is fragmented.

title: Green hydrogen cost curve
description: Electrolyzer and renewable electricity costs must fall for green hydrogen to replace gray in industry.

title: Building retrofit financing
description: Deep retrofit of buildings saves energy but upfront costs and split incentives between tenants and owners block adoption.

title: Climate risk disclosure quality
description: Companies publish scenario analyses that are hard to compare; investors lack standardized metrics.

title: Distributed solar policy
description: Net metering rules change abruptly; rooftop solar adoption becomes unpredictable for homeowners.

title: Just transition for fossil workers
description: Coal regions need retraining and new industries; timelines for plant closures are politically contested.
